Software, automation, and AI for growing businesses

Software that feels simple. Built for work that is not.

We help teams cut manual work, connect disconnected systems, and ship software that fits how the business actually runs — backed by secure, production-grade engineering across web, cloud, automation, and AI.

Book a free consultationExplore our services

Security by design

Threat-aware architecture, hardened integrations, and release practices that reduce operational risk from day one.

Built to scale

Cloud-ready systems, maintainable code, and pragmatic architecture that can grow with teams, traffic, and data.

Privacy first

Careful data handling, permission-aware workflows, and product decisions shaped around user trust.

Technology

The right technology for the job — chosen to fit your business, not the other way around.

Web

Secure, scalable web products and APIs with modern frontend and backend foundations.

React

Component-driven interfaces for fast, polished, maintainable web applications.

Node.js

Efficient server-side JavaScript for APIs, integrations, automation, and real-time services.

TypeScript

Typed JavaScript that improves reliability, refactoring confidence, and long-term maintainability.

Mobile

Native and cross-platform mobile experiences designed for performance and everyday usability.

iOS development

Native Apple mobile applications with smooth interactions and platform-specific quality.

React Native

Cross-platform mobile apps that share product logic while preserving a native feel.

Desktop

Desktop software for focused workflows, internal operations, and cross-platform productivity tools.

Swift

Native macOS applications with Apple-quality performance, privacy, and interface behavior.

Electron

Cross-platform desktop apps built with web technologies and packaged for team workflows.

Microsoft

Practical Microsoft 365 and Power Platform solutions that improve day-to-day office work.

Power Apps

Power Apps, Power Automate, and Power BI solutions for forms, approvals, dashboards, and automation.

Power Automate

Excel automation for repeatable reporting, cleanup, and business process shortcuts.

Copilot Studio

Enables users to build, customize, and deploy AI-powered copilots and chatbots across Microsoft services.

SharePoint Online

Cloud-based platform for team collaboration, document management, and intranet site creation.

Our projects

Digital products designed around sensitive, human workflows.

Mental health platform

A calmer way to find and work with a therapist online.

TerraPia helps people search for a therapist by issue, meet through secure on-platform video sessions, take private session notes, keep a privacy-aware virtual journal, share selected entries with their chosen therapist, and track progress over time.

Issue-based therapist searchSecure video sessions with notesPrivacy-aware virtual journalProgress tracking

Group scheduling platform

Grouped schedules, payments, and attendance, kept in sync.

peasySchedule helps teams and groups organize shared schedules, track member payments and attendance, and keep every participant in sync across devices in real time.

Grouped schedule organizationPayment trackingAttendance trackingReal-time sync across members

Clients

Trusted by teams across commerce, logistics, gaming, and hospitality.

Capabilities

Software that fits the way your business operates.

Apps and platforms

Modern web products, SaaS platforms, and internal tools shaped around secure, scalable business workflows.

AI and automation

AI agents, chatbots, and workflow automation that take over the repetitive work — document processing, approvals, and internal knowledge search.

Cloud systems

APIs, infrastructure, integrations, and migrations designed to scale cleanly without unnecessary complexity.

Data experiences

Dashboards, automation, and analytics interfaces that keep sensitive operational data useful and well protected.

Ongoing reliability

Testing, security reviews, deployment pipelines, and support for software your team depends on every day.

Business problems

We solve real, everyday problems — not just build software.

Before

Manual, repetitive work eats up your team's time.

After

Automated workflows and AI agents handle the repetitive parts.

Before

Employees waste time searching for documents and answers.

After

Centralized systems and AI-powered search surface what people need.

Before

Core systems don't talk to each other.

After

Integrations and APIs connect the tools you already use.

Before

Approvals and internal processes move too slowly.

After

Streamlined, automated approval workflows.

Before

Internal tools are outdated or don't fit how you work.

After

Custom software built around your actual workflow.

Before

Reporting still happens by hand, in spreadsheets.

After

Automated dashboards and reporting your team can trust.

Approach

Thoughtful process. Fewer surprises. Better software.

01

Understand your business

We learn how your team actually works, where time is lost, and what success looks like before proposing anything.

02

Design the solution

We recommend the most effective approach — technology chosen to fit the problem, not the other way around.

03

Build

We develop in focused, production-ready releases with security and scalability visible from the start.

04

Deploy

We roll out with minimal disruption to your daily operations.

05

Support

We stay on as a long-term partner — monitoring, improving, and extending the system as your business grows.

About spyglee

Full-stack software development.

We design and build across web, mobile, desktop, and cloud, with practical Microsoft 365 and automation expertise built in — secure, scalable software shaped around how your business actually runs.

Start

Bring us an idea, a workflow, or a system that needs to grow without compromising security or privacy.
